description:
- Remove context and graph view
- Remove projects on the left and move adding, deleting, modifying projects to settings
- All tasks for all projects should be one tab but with a drop down to choose between all or specific project
- Auto mode should be a button not a toggle than pulls up a modal to enable auto mode for all projects or specific projects with verification requirment as a option also. You should from this menu be able to set max agents 1-10 per project.
- Both left menu should be reworked
	- first Left side menu should be removed.
	- second left side menu should be adjusted.
		- Github issues and pull request should be one combined button with tabs
		- Tools should be one button with tabs once your there
		- Project button should be removed
		- Agent runner and terminal should be moved to tools button
	- wiki should be in settings
	- running agents should have 2 statuses, one for running, and one for waiting approval
	- With these condensed the buttons should be placed in a bar at top to allow removing both left bars.
	- Completed features should be a togglable view in main view of kanban board but it shows completed by date in a list with filters and search.
	- Usage needs to be reworked as it constnatly breaks and does not update when using claude code
	- There should be a auto pull feature and also a auto checker that shows when a task have been modified on remote so that users in a team can understand when a feature has been started. Features should support started as in there cherry picked to update on remote main so that other users can see started features, these can then be unstarted and placed back into backlog. Started should be a tab in Kanban view. there should be a label to show who started it as they are the owner.
title: Reorganize UI layout with condensed navigation and enhanced project management

descriptionHistory.description:
- Remove context and graph view
- Remove projects on the left and move adding, deleting, modifying projects to settings
- All tasks for all projects should be one tab but with a drop down to choose between all or specific project
- Auto mode should be a button not a toggle than pulls up a modal to enable auto mode for all projects or specific projects with verification requirment as a option also. You should from this menu be able to set max agents 1-10 per project.
- Both left menu should be reworked
	- first Left side menu should be removed.
	- second left side menu should be adjusted.
		- Github issues and pull request should be one combined button with tabs
		- Tools should be one button with tabs once your there
		- Project button should be removed
		- Agent runner and terminal should be moved to tools button
	- wiki should be in settings
	- running agents should have 2 statuses, one for running, and one for waiting approval
	- With these condensed the buttons should be placed in a bar at top to allow removing both left bars.
	- Completed features should be a togglable view in main view of kanban board but it shows completed by date in a list with filters and search.
	- Usage needs to be reworked as it constnatly breaks and does not update when using claude code
	- There should be a auto pull feature and also a auto checker that shows when a task have been modified on remote so that users in a team can understand when a feature has been started. Features should support started as in there cherry picked to update on remote main so that other users can see started features, these can then be unstarted and placed back into backlog. Started should be a tab in Kanban view. there should be a label to show who started it as they are the owner.

Based on my extensive analysis of the codebase, I now have a comprehensive understanding of the current architecture. Let me now generate the specification for this feature request.

---

# Specification: Major UI Restructure - Navigation and Auto Mode Overhaul

## 1. Problem Statement

Users currently face a cluttered interface with two sidebars (project switcher and main sidebar), scattered navigation items, and a toggle-based auto mode that lacks granular control. The current layout requires too many clicks to access common features, and the auto mode doesn't provide per-project configuration. Additionally, there's no visibility into feature remote sync status for team collaboration.

## 2. User Story

As a **developer using DMaker with multiple projects in a team**, I want **a streamlined single-bar navigation with modal-based auto mode configuration and team collaboration visibility**, so that **I can efficiently navigate features, control agent execution per-project, and coordinate with teammates on feature ownership**.

## 3. Acceptance Criteria

### Happy Path - Navigation Consolidation
- **GIVEN** the application is loaded
- **WHEN** I view the main interface
- **THEN** I see a single horizontal top bar with: Tasks dropdown (all/specific project), GitHub (Issues+PRs with tabs), Tools (Ideation, Spec, Memory + Agent Runner + Terminal), Settings, and Running Agents status

### Happy Path - Auto Mode Modal
- **GIVEN** I click the Auto Mode button in the header
- **WHEN** the modal opens
- **THEN** I can select all projects or specific projects, set max agents (1-10) per project, toggle verification requirement per project, and enable/disable auto mode

### Happy Path - Completed Features View
- **GIVEN** I toggle the completed features view on the Kanban board
- **WHEN** I view completed features
- **THEN** I see features grouped by completion date with filters and search functionality

### Happy Path - Running Agents Status
- **GIVEN** agents are running across projects
- **WHEN** I view the running agents indicator
- **THEN** I see separate counts for "Running" and "Waiting Approval" statuses

### Edge Case - No Projects Selected
- **GIVEN** no project is selected in the tasks dropdown
- **WHEN** I view the board
- **THEN** I see tasks from all projects combined

### Edge Case - Feature Started Remotely
- **GIVEN** team collaboration mode is enabled
- **WHEN** another team member starts a feature
- **THEN** I see the feature marked as "Started" with owner information in a new "Started" Kanban column

### Error Handling - Auto Mode Enable Failure
- **GIVEN** I try to enable auto mode with invalid settings
- **WHEN** the API call fails
- **THEN** I see an error toast with specific failure reason

## 4. Technical Context

| Aspect | Value |
|--------|-------|
| Affected Files | ~40 files (see Implementation Tasks) |
| Dependencies | None (using existing UI components) |
| Constraints | Must maintain backward compatibility with existing feature data |
| Patterns to Follow | Existing Zustand store patterns, React hook patterns, TanStack Router file-based routing |

## 5. Non-Goals

- **NOT** changing backend auto-mode logic (only UI configuration)
- **NOT** implementing real-time WebSocket sync for team features (will poll)
- **NOT** removing any underlying API endpoints
- **NOT** changing the data storage format for features
- **NOT** implementing user authentication for team features (uses git identity)

## 6. Implementation Tasks

```tasks
## Phase 1: Remove Deprecated Views and Navigation Items
- [ ] T001: Delete context view route and component | File: apps/ui/src/routes/context.tsx
- [ ] T002: Delete graph view route and component | File: apps/ui/src/routes/graph.tsx  
- [ ] T003: Remove context and graph from sidebar navigation hook | File: apps/ui/src/components/layout/sidebar/hooks/use-navigation.ts
- [ ] T004: Remove SIDEBAR_FEATURE_FLAGS for hideContext | File: apps/ui/src/components/layout/sidebar/constants.ts
- [ ] T005: Delete context-view.tsx component | File: apps/ui/src/components/views/context-view.tsx
- [ ] T006: Delete graph-view-page.tsx and graph-view folder | File: apps/ui/src/components/views/graph-view-page.tsx

## Phase 2: Remove Project Switcher Sidebar (First Left Menu)
- [ ] T007: Remove ProjectSwitcher from __root.tsx layout | File: apps/ui/src/routes/__root.tsx
- [ ] T008: Delete project-switcher component folder | File: apps/ui/src/components/layout/project-switcher/project-switcher.tsx
- [ ] T009: Move wiki button to settings section | File: apps/ui/src/components/views/settings-view

## Phase 3: Create Top Navigation Bar
- [ ] T010: Create TopNavigationBar component with project dropdown | File: apps/ui/src/components/layout/top-nav-bar.tsx
- [ ] T011: Add Tasks dropdown (all projects / specific project filter) | File: apps/ui/src/components/layout/top-nav-bar.tsx
- [ ] T012: Create combined GitHub button with tabs (Issues + PRs) | File: apps/ui/src/components/layout/top-nav-bar.tsx
- [ ] T013: Create combined Tools button with tabs (Ideation, Spec, Memory, Agent Runner, Terminal) | File: apps/ui/src/components/layout/top-nav-bar.tsx
- [ ] T014: Add Settings button to top bar | File: apps/ui/src/components/layout/top-nav-bar.tsx
- [ ] T015: Add Running Agents status with dual counts (running/waiting approval) | File: apps/ui/src/components/layout/top-nav-bar.tsx

## Phase 4: Remove Second Sidebar
- [ ] T016: Update __root.tsx to use TopNavigationBar instead of Sidebar | File: apps/ui/src/routes/__root.tsx
- [ ] T017: Relocate keyboard shortcuts from sidebar to top bar | File: apps/ui/src/components/layout/top-nav-bar.tsx
- [ ] T018: Delete sidebar.tsx and sidebar folder | File: apps/ui/src/components/layout/sidebar.tsx

## Phase 5: Auto Mode Modal Implementation
- [ ] T019: Create AutoModeModal component | File: apps/ui/src/components/dialogs/auto-mode-modal.tsx
- [ ] T020: Add project selection (all/specific) with checkboxes | File: apps/ui/src/components/dialogs/auto-mode-modal.tsx
- [ ] T021: Add max agents slider (1-10) per project | File: apps/ui/src/components/dialogs/auto-mode-modal.tsx
- [ ] T022: Add verification requirement toggle per project | File: apps/ui/src/components/dialogs/auto-mode-modal.tsx
- [ ] T023: Update app-store to support per-project auto mode config | File: apps/ui/src/store/app-store.ts
- [ ] T024: Replace auto mode toggle with modal trigger button in header | File: apps/ui/src/components/views/board-view/board-header.tsx

## Phase 6: Move Project Management to Settings
- [ ] T025: Create Projects settings section | File: apps/ui/src/components/views/settings-view/projects/projects-section.tsx
- [ ] T026: Add project CRUD operations to settings (add, delete, modify) | File: apps/ui/src/components/views/settings-view/projects/projects-section.tsx
- [ ] T027: Add settings navigation entry for Projects | File: apps/ui/src/components/views/settings-view/components/settings-navigation.tsx
- [ ] T028: Move wiki content to settings view | File: apps/ui/src/components/views/settings-view/wiki/wiki-section.tsx

## Phase 7: Completed Features View Rework
- [ ] T029: Add completed toggle button to board header | File: apps/ui/src/components/views/board-view/board-header.tsx
- [ ] T030: Create CompletedFeaturesListView component | File: apps/ui/src/components/views/board-view/completed-features-list-view.tsx
- [ ] T031: Add date grouping to completed features | File: apps/ui/src/components/views/board-view/completed-features-list-view.tsx
- [ ] T032: Add filters (date range, project, category) | File: apps/ui/src/components/views/board-view/completed-features-list-view.tsx
- [ ] T033: Add search functionality to completed view | File: apps/ui/src/components/views/board-view/completed-features-list-view.tsx

## Phase 8: Running Agents Status Rework
- [ ] T034: Update running agents view to show dual status | File: apps/ui/src/components/views/running-agents-view.tsx
- [ ] T035: Add "Waiting Approval" status tracking to store | File: apps/ui/src/store/app-store.ts
- [ ] T036: Update use-auto-mode hook to track approval status | File: apps/ui/src/hooks/use-auto-mode.ts
- [ ] T037: Create RunningAgentsIndicator for top bar | File: apps/ui/src/components/layout/running-agents-indicator.tsx

## Phase 9: Team Collaboration Features (Started Status)
- [ ] T038: Add "started" status to Feature type | File: libs/types/src/feature.ts
- [ ] T039: Add "Started" column to Kanban board | File: apps/ui/src/components/views/board-view/constants.ts
- [ ] T040: Add feature owner field (git user identity) | File: libs/types/src/feature.ts
- [ ] T041: Create auto-pull feature for remote sync | File: apps/ui/src/hooks/use-remote-sync.ts
- [ ] T042: Add remote modified indicator UI | File: apps/ui/src/components/views/board-view/components/kanban-card
- [ ] T043: Implement unstart feature (move back to backlog) | File: apps/ui/src/components/views/board-view/hooks/use-board-actions.ts

## Phase 10: Usage Tracking Rework
- [ ] T044: Fix usage popover update logic | File: apps/ui/src/components/claude-usage-popover.tsx
- [ ] T045: Add Claude Code API usage tracking | File: apps/ui/src/hooks/use-usage-tracking.ts
- [ ] T046: Create unified usage display component | File: apps/ui/src/components/usage-display.tsx

## Phase 11: Cleanup and Testing
- [ ] T047: Remove unused imports and dead code | File: Multiple files
- [ ] T048: Update keyboard shortcuts config | File: apps/ui/src/hooks/use-keyboard-shortcuts.ts
- [ ] T049: Update E2E tests for new navigation | File: tests/e2e/
- [ ] T050: Update route file-based routing | File: apps/ui/src/routes/
```

## 7. Success Metrics

- [ ] Both left sidebars are removed
- [ ] Single top navigation bar with all navigation items
- [ ] Context and Graph views completely removed
- [ ] Auto mode opens as modal with per-project configuration
- [ ] Projects management moved to Settings
- [ ] Wiki moved to Settings
- [ ] GitHub Issues and PRs combined under single button with tabs
- [ ] Tools (Ideation, Spec, Memory, Agent Runner, Terminal) combined under single button with tabs
- [ ] Running agents shows dual status (running/waiting approval)
- [ ] Completed features viewable as date-grouped list with filters/search
- [ ] Started status column visible for team collaboration
- [ ] Usage tracking updates correctly during Claude Code operations

## 8. Risks & Mitigations

| Risk | Mitigation |
|------|------------|
| Breaking existing user workflows | Maintain keyboard shortcuts with same keys, provide migration guide |
| Loss of navigation discoverability | Use clear icons + tooltips on top bar, group related items logically |
| Auto mode config complexity | Progressive disclosure - simple view by default, advanced options expandable |
| Team sync conflicts | Use git-based ownership, show clear indicators, allow manual override |
| Performance with all-projects view | Lazy load features, virtualize long lists |
| State migration for new auto mode config | Add migration in store hydration logic |

---
